'''âg-ng-zh-p''' ('''kagangzhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quitch|quitch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quitch|quitch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-ng-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kagangzhepoko
|}
